headline: 2 Reasons to Sell NXPI and 1 Stock to Buy Instead
summary: NXP Semiconductors has been treading water for the past six months, recording a small loss of 2.1% while holding steady at $223.33. The stock also fell short of the S&P 500’s 6.6% gain during that period.
